name: Balance
summary: Traverse a narrow surface or avoid falling.

sample_tasks.summary: Walking through tangled roots or on uneven cobblestones.
Walking across a wooden beam.
Walking across deep, loose gravel.
Walking across a tight rope or over a smooth sheet of ice.
Walking along a razor's edge or running across chunks of flooring falling in midair.

name: Tumble Through
summary: Evade an enemy by tumbling through their space or any space they threaten.

sample_tasks.summary: Tumbling around an enemy to get past them without being hit.

name: Maneuver in Flight
summary: Attempting a difficult maneuver while flying.

sample_tasks.summary: Making a steep ascent or descent.
Flying against the wind or through turbulent air.
Reversing direction and flying backwards.
Flying through gale force winds.

name: Squeeze
summary: Contorting to squeeze through a space so small one can barely fit through.

sample_tasks.summary: Squeezing through a space barely fitting the character's shoulders.
Squeezing through a space barely fitting the character's head.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall Knowledge about arcane theories; magic traditions; creatures of arcane significance (like constructs, beasts, and elementals); and the Astral Plane, Elemental Planes, and the Netherworld.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of an important spellcaster or common magical creature.
Recalling something about a common or uncommon magical tradition or creature.
Recalling specific details about a common or uncommon magical tradition or creature.
Recalling obscure details about a commmon, uncommon or rare magical tradition or creature.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about any magical tradition or creature.

name: Borrow an Arcane Spell
summary: Prepare a spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

sample_tasks.summary: Preparing a spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

name: Decipher Writing
summary: Decipher a script about arcane theories or spells.

sample_tasks.summary: Deciphering an entry-level philosophical treatise on magic.
Deciphering a complex spell or ritual text.
Deciphering advanced research notes on a complex magical topic.
Deciphering ancient runes or magical script that hasn't been seen for eons.

name: Identify Magic
summary: Identify a spell from the arcane tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Identifying a spell cast by a wizard.

name: Learn a Spell
summary: Learn a new spell from the arcane tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Learning a new spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

name: Climb
summary: Climb up, down or across an incline, wall or other obstacle.

sample_tasks.summary: Climbing a ladder, steep slope or low-branched tree.
Climbing up a ship's rigging, a hanging rope or a typical tree.
Climbing a wall with small handholds and footholds.
Climbing across a ceiling with handholds and footholds or up a rock wall.
Climbing up a smooth vertical surface such as a glass wall or a sheer ice wall.

name: Force Open
summary: Forcefully open a door, window, container or heavy gate using a tool or one's body.

sample_tasks.summary: Tearing through fabric or breaking flimsy glass.
Breaking ice or sturdy glass.
Forcing open a flimsy wooden door or wooden portcullis.
Forcing open a sturdy wooden door, iron portcullis or metal bars.
Forcing open a heavy stone or iron door.

name: Grapple
summary: Grab hold of a creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Grabbing a creature and restraining them.

name: High Jump
summary: Jump vertically as high as possible after a short run up.

sample_tasks.summary: Leaping up to grab the top of a wall or ledge.

name: Long Jump
summary: Jump horizontally as far as possible after a short run.

sample_tasks.summary: Leaping across a chasm or gap.

name: Reposition
summary: Bodily move another creature or object around.

sample_tasks.summary: Dragging a creature to the side.

name: Shove
summary: Push a creature away.

sample_tasks.summary: Shoving a creature away.

name: Swim
summary: Swim through a body of water.

sample_tasks.summary: Swimming in a lake or still water.
Swimming through flowing water, like a river.
Swimming through a swiftly flowing river or strong current.
Swimming through a stormy sea.
Swimming through a maelstrom or up a waterfall.

name: Trip
summary: Knock a creature prone.

sample_tasks.summary: Tripping a creature by kicking its legs out from under it.

name: Disarm
summary: Knock a weapon from a creature's grasp.

sample_tasks.summary: Disarming a creature of its weapon.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall Knowledge about alchemical reactions, the value of items, engineering, unusual materials, and alchemical or mechanical creatures, such as constructs.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common item or construct.
Recalling something about a common or uncommon item or construct.
Recalling specific details about a common or uncommon item or construct.
Recalling obscure details about a commmon, uncommon or rare item or construct.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about any item or construct.

name: Repair
summary: Fix a broken item.

sample_tasks.summary: Repairing a cracked wooden shield.

name: Craft
summary: Craft an item.

sample_tasks.summary: Forging a weapon.

name: Earn Income
summary: Earn income by crafting or repairing items and goods for the market.

sample_tasks.summary: Crafting a chair to sell.

name: Identify Alchemy
summary: Identify alchemical items and reagents.

sample_tasks.summary: Identifying an elixir or alchemical bomb.

name: Create a Diversion
summary: Distract a creature and draw its attention elsewhere.

sample_tasks.summary: Throwing a rock to distract a guard.

name: Feint
summary: Perform a feint in combat to leave an opponent off-guard.

sample_tasks.summary: Feinting in combat to leave an opponent off-guard.

name: Impersonate
summary: Create a disguise to pass as someone else.

sample_tasks.summary: Disguising as a guard to gain access to a restricted area.

name: Lie
summary: Tell a lie to deceive someone.

sample_tasks.summary: Telling a lie to deceive someone.

name: Gather Information
summary: Canvass local markets, taverns, and gathering places in an attempt to learn about a creature, individual or topic.

sample_tasks.summary: Learning the general talk of the town.
Learning a common rumor.
Learning an obscure rumor or poorly guarded secret.
Learning well-guarded or esoteric information.
Learning information known only to an incredibly select few or only to rare and extraordinary beings.

name: Make an Impression
summary: Seek to make a good impression on someone to make them temporarily agreeable.

sample_tasks.summary: Flattering a noble to gain favor.

name: Request
summary: Make a request of a creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Asking a shopkeeper to lower the price of an item.

name: Coerce
summary: Threaten a creature into doing what you want.

sample_tasks.summary: Threatening a guard to gain passage.

name: Demoralize
summary: Shake an enemy's resolve and frighten them.

sample_tasks.summary: Scaring a goblin into attacking hesitantly.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Use knowledge of a specific topic to recall lore.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling a well-known fact about a topic.
Recalling a commonly-known fact about a topic.
Recalling an uncommonly-known fact about a topic.
Recalling a rarely-known fact about a topic.
Recalling a secret or forgotten fact about a topic.

name: Earn Income
summary: Earn income by using knowledge of a specific topic to practice a trade.

sample_tasks.summary: Earning a wage as a professional.

name: Administer First Aid
summary: Administer first aid to a creature that is dying or bleeding.

sample_tasks.summary: Staunching a wound to stop the bleeding.
Stabilizing a dying creature.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall knowledge about diseases, injuries, poisons, and other ailments.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common disease or poison.
Recalling a specific detail about a common or uncommon disease or poison.
Recalling details of a common or uncommon disease or poison.
Recalling obscure details of common, uncommon or rare disease or poison.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about even the rarest disease or poison.

name: Treat Disease
summary: Care for and attempt to cure a diseased creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Providing bed rest and care for a sick creature.

name: Treat Poison
summary: Care for and attempt to cure a poisoned creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Treating the symptoms of a poisoned creature.

name: Treat Wounds
summary: Care for and heal a wounded creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Suturing and bandaging a wounded creature.

name: Command an Animal
summary: Issue a command to an animal and have it obey.

sample_tasks.summary: Getting a dog to fetch a stick.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall knowledge about fauna, flora, geography, weather, the environment, creatures of natural origin (like animals, beasts, fey, and plants), the First World, and the Elemental Planes.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common animal, plant, or a well-known fact about nature.
Recalling a specific detail about a common or uncommon animal, plant, or natural phenomena.
Recalling details of a common or uncommon animal, plant, or natural phenomena.
Recalling obscure details of common, uncommon or rare animal, plant, or natural phenomena.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about even the rarest animal, plant, or natural phenomena.

name: Identify Magic
summary: Identify a spell from the primal tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Identifying a spell cast by a druid.

name: Learn a Spell
summary: Learn a new spell from the primal tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Learning a new spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall knowledge about ancient mysteries; obscure philosophies; creatures of occult significance (like aberrations, spirits, and oozes); and esoteric planes like the Astral Plane, Creation's Forge, the Ethereal Plane, the Netherworld, and the Void.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common occult mystery, philosophy, creature, or plane.
Recalling a specific detail about a common or uncommon occult mystery, philosophy, creature, or plane.
Recalling details of a common or uncommon occult mystery, philosophy, creature, or plane.
Recalling obscure details of common, uncommon or rare occult mystery, philosophy, creature, or plane.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about even the rarest occult mystery, philosophy, creature, or plane.

name: Decipher Writing
summary: Decipher Writing on occult topics, including complex metaphysical systems, syncretic principles, obscure philosophies, and incoherent ramblings.

sample_tasks.summary: Deciphering writings on common or well-known occult topics.
Deciphering writings on uncommon or advanced occult topics.
Deciphering writings on rare or extremely complex occult topics.
Deciphering writings on occult topics in incomprehensible languages or symbols.

name: Identify Magic
summary: Identify a spell from the occult tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Identifying a spell cast by a witch.

name: Learn a Spell
summary: Learn a new spell from the occult tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Learning a new spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

name: Perform
summary: Make a brief performance such as one song, a quick dance, or a few jokes.

sample_tasks.summary: Impressing an audience of commoners with a brief performance.
Impressing an audience of artisans with a brief performance.
Impressing an audience of merchants or minor nobles with a brief performance.
Impressing an audience of high nobles or minor royalty with a brief performance.
Impressing an audience of powerful, otherworldly beings or major royalty with a brief performance.

name: Earn Income
summary: Stage a performance to earn money.

sample_tasks.summary: Earning money from a performance in a town square.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall knowledge about divine agents, the finer points of theology, obscure myths regarding a faith, and creatures of religious significance (like celestials, fiends, and undead), Creation's Forge, the Void, and the Outer Sphere.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common celestial, fiend or undead.
Recalling a specific detail about a common or uncommon celestial, fiend or undead.
Recalling details of a common or uncommon celestial, fiend or undead.
Recalling obscure details of common, uncommon or rare celestial, fiend or undead.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about even the rarest celestial, fiend or undead.

name: Decipher Writing
summary: Decipher Writing of a religious nature, including allegories, homilies, and proverbs.

sample_tasks.summary: Deciphering writings on common or well-known religious topics.
Deciphering writings on uncommon or advanced religious topics.
Deciphering writings on rare or extremely complex religious topics.
Deciphering writings on religious topics in incomprehensible languages or symbols.

name: Identify Magic
summary: Identify a spell from the divine tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Identifying a spell cast by a cleric.

name: Learn a Spell
summary: Learn a new spell from the divine tradition.

sample_tasks.summary: Learning a new spell from another spellcaster's spellbook or collection of spells.

name: Recall Knowledge
summary: Recall knowledge about local history, important personalities, legal institutions, societal structure, and humanoid cultures. The GM might allow Society to apply to other creatures that are major elements of society in your region, such as the draconic nobility in a kingdom of humans ruled by dragons.

sample_tasks.summary: Recalling the name of a common humanoid group or organization.
Recalling a specific detail about a common or uncommon humanoid group or organization.
Recalling details of a common or uncommon humanoid group or organization.
Recalling obscure details of common, uncommon or rare humanoid group or organization.
Recalling obscure, secret or forgotten details about even the rarest humanoid group or organization.

name: Subsist
summary: Subsist in a settlement by finding shelter, scrounging, or begging for food.

sample_tasks.summary: Surviving in a large city with plentiful resources.
Surviving in a village.
Surviving in an insular hamlet.
Surviving in a city under siege.
Surviving in a city of undead.

name: Create Forgery
summary: Create a forgery of a document or object.

sample_tasks.summary: Forging an invitation to get into a party.

name: Decipher Writing
summary: Decipher Writing that's a coded message, text written in an incomplete or archaic form, or in some cases, text in a language you don't know.

sample_tasks.summary: Deciphering writings in common cypher or language.
Deciphering writings in uncommon language or advanced cypher.
Deciphering writings in rare cyphers or archaic languages.
Deciphering writings in secret cyphers or forgotten languages.

name: Conceal an Object
summary: Hide a small object to avoid discovery when searched.

sample_tasks.summary: Hiding a dagger up a sleeve.

name: Hide
summary: Hide behind cover or blend deeper into concealment.

sample_tasks.summary: Hiding behind a pillar in an empty room.

name: Sneak
summary: Slowly move silently or stay hidden while moving.

sample_tasks.summary: Moving silently across creaky floorboards to avoid waking a guard.

name: Sense Direction
summary: Use knowledge of the natural world and survival experience to navigate.

sample_tasks.summary: Determining the cardinal directions using the sun.
Finding an overgrown path in a forest.
Navigating a hedge maze.
Navigating a byzantine labyrinth or a relatively featureless desert.
Navigating an ever-changing dream realm.

name: Subsist
summary: Subsist in the wild by foraging for food and building shelter.

sample_tasks.summary: Surviving in a lush forest with calm weather.
Surviving on a hillside.
Surviving in the mountains.
Surviving in a desert.
Surviving in a barren wasteland.

name: Cover Tracks
summary: Hide any trace of passage while on the move.

sample_tasks.summary: Dusting away footprints in a forest.

name: Track
summary: Follow tracks left by a creature or vehicle.

sample_tasks.summary: Following the path of a large army following a road.
Following the relatively fresh track of a rampaging bear through the plains.
Following a nimble panther's tracks through a jungle or tracks obscured by rainfall.
Following tracks obscured by winter snow, track of a mouse or smaller creature, or tracks left on surfaces that can't hold prints like bare rock.
Following old tracks through a windy desert's sands or tracks after a major blizzard or hurricane.

name: Palm an Object
summary: Secretly pick up a small, unattended object.

sample_tasks.summary: Palming a coin from a table.

name: Steal
summary: Secretly steal a small object from a creature.

sample_tasks.summary: Stealing a coin purse from a person in a crowd.

name: Disable a Device
summary: Disarm a trap or disable a complex device.

sample_tasks.summary: Disarming a simple tripwire trap.

name: Pick a Lock
summary: Open a lock without a key.

sample_tasks.summary: Picking the lock on a simple chest.
